name: codetruss
description: Verify the acceptance contract for coding-agent changes locally.

interface.shortDescription: Local acceptance gate for coding-agent changes
interface.longDescription: Declare approved scope and repository checks, evaluate the captured Git state locally, and produce a verifiable receipt before commit. Requires the separately installed free CodeTruss CLI; no CodeTruss account or upload is required.
defaultPrompt: Set up CodeTruss for this repository
Review my current changes against the task
Verify and explain my latest CodeTruss receipt
